task_name: add Mistral Instruct v3 chat template

details.reasoning: The implementation has correct scaffolding but critical implementation flaws. Positives: new function exists, template auto-detection is properly registered with correct distinguishing checks ([INST] present, [SYSTEM_PROMPT] absent), LOG_DBG call is present, handler is dispatched correctly with (tmpl, params), and no existing code is modified. Critical failures: (1) Format is COMMON_CHAT_FORMAT_PEG_NATIVE instead of COMMON_CHAT_FORMAT_CONTENT_ONLY, (2) Handler implementation is generic PEG parser setup rather than Mistral Instruct v3 specialized logic, (3) Missing explicit [INST]/[/INST] wrapping of user turns, (4) Missing system message prepending to first user turn, (5) Missing </s> appending after assistant turns. The function appears to be a copy-paste from another handler rather than a proper Mistral Instruct v3 implementation with the required specialized behavior.
